requirement_topic.en: EPDK Unlicensed Generation and TEDAS / Distribution Grid-Connection Review
requirement_topic.zh: EPDK 非持证发电与 TEDAS / 配电并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: EPDK 非持證發電與 TEDAS / 配電併網審查

summary.en: Turkish distributed solar projects may proceed under the EPDK unlicensed electricity generation framework where the project qualifies, but the inverter is still reviewed in the project grid-connection file by the relevant distribution company and TEDAS-related technical acceptance route. Product test reports do not replace connection opinion, project approval, protection settings, metering, commissioning, or acceptance documents.
summary.zh: 符合条件的土耳其分布式光伏项目可依据 EPDK 非持证发电框架推进，但逆变器仍需在相关配电公司及 TEDAS 相关技术验收路径的项目并网文件中接受审查。产品测试报告不能替代接入意见、项目批准、保护参数、计量、投运或验收文件。
summary.zht: 符合條件的土耳其分散式光伏專案可依據 EPDK 非持證發電框架推進，但逆變器仍需在相關配電公司及 TEDAS 相關技術驗收路徑的專案併網文件中接受審查。產品測試報告不能替代接入意見、專案批准、保護參數、計量、投運或驗收文件。

standards_or_laws: Regulation on Unlicensed Electricity Generation in the Electricity Market
TEDAS and distribution-company project connection and acceptance practices

summary.en: China State Grid, China Southern Power Grid, GB/T 19964-2024, and GB/T 37408 documentation can support technical comparisons, but Turkish connection approval depends on the local project, distribution company, EPDK framework, and TEDAS-related acceptance route.
summary.zh: 中国国家电网、南方电网、GB/T 19964-2024 和 GB/T 37408 文件可支持技术比较，但土耳其并网批准取决于当地项目、配电公司、EPDK 框架及 TEDAS 相关验收路径。
summary.zht: 中國國家電網、南方電網、GB/T 19964-2024 和 GB/T 37408 文件可支持技術比較，但土耳其併網批准取決於當地專案、配電公司、EPDK 框架及 TEDAS 相關驗收路徑。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project procedures

gap.en: The gap is Turkish project acceptance. Exporters should prepare single-line diagrams, inverter model certificates, protection setting tables, grid-code parameter ranges, reactive-power capability, remote-control or monitoring interface evidence, meter and communication compatibility, commissioning records, and Turkish-language operation documents for the project owner and distribution company.
gap.zh: 差距在于土耳其项目验收。出口商应为项目业主和配电公司准备单线图、逆变器型号证书、保护参数表、电网规范参数范围、无功能力、远程控制或监控接口证据、计量和通信兼容性、投运记录，以及土耳其语运行文件。
gap.zht: 差距在於土耳其專案驗收。出口商應為專案業主和配電公司準備單線圖、逆變器型號證書、保護參數表、電網規範參數範圍、無功能力、遠端控制或監控介面證據、計量和通信相容性、投運記錄，以及土耳其語運行文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects that seek Turkish grid connection under the relevant licensed or unlicensed generation route; acceptance is project- and distribution-company-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese grid approval does not transfer to Turkish EPDK/TEDAS/distribution approval

source.publisher: Energy Market Regulatory Authority of Turkey (EPDK)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Turkish EPDK/TEDAS grid connection as a project approval path separate from product CE or GB/T testing; no China grid certificate should be presented as Turkish interconnection approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将土耳其 EPDK/TEDAS 并网视为独立于产品 CE 或 GB/T 测试的项目批准路径；不得将中国并网证书表述为土耳其并网批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將土耳其 EPDK/TEDAS 併網視為獨立於產品 CE 或 GB/T 測試的專案批准路徑；不得將中國併網證書表述為土耳其併網批准。
